mapper.select: SELECT open_time, `interval`, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, close_time, quote_volume, trade_count FROM kline_btcusdt WHERE `interval` = #{interval} AND ( open_time BETWEEN #{startMs} AND #{endMs} OR open_time BETWEEN #{startMs} * 1000 AND #{endMs} * 1000 OR open_time BETWEEN #{startMs} * 1000000 AND #{endMs} * 1000000 ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN open_time >= 1000000000000000000 THEN open_time DIV 1000000 WHEN open_time >= 1000000000000000 THEN open_time DIV 1000 ELSE open_time END ASC

SELECT open_time, `interval`, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, close_time, quote_volume, trade_count FROM kline_btcusdt WHERE `interval` = #{interval} ORDER BY CASE WHEN open_time >= 1000000000000000000 THEN open_time DIV 1000000 WHEN open_time >= 1000000000000000 THEN open_time DIV 1000 ELSE open_time END DESC LIMIT #{limit}
